nasb.text: And Eleazar the son of Aaron died; and they buried him at Gibeah of Phinehas his son, which was given him in the hill country of Ephraim.

esv.text: And Eleazar the son of Aaron died, and they buried him at Gibeah, the town of Phinehas his son, which had been given him in the hill country of Ephraim.

cnv.text: 亞倫的兒子以利亞撒也死了；以色列人就把他埋葬在基比亞，就是他兒子非尼哈在以法蓮山地所得的產業。

ccb.text: 亚伦的儿子以利亚撒也死了，他们把他葬在他儿子非尼哈分到的以法莲山区的基比亚。
